## Review

Nice work! You built an agentic workflow that uses natural language instructions to automate repository analysis.

Here is what you practiced:

- Defining workflow intent in Markdown frontmatter and prompt content.
- Applying least-privilege permissions and explicit tool access.
- Adding safe outputs to constrain changes.
- Running, observing, and improving agent output quality.
- Scheduling recurring execution with cron.

### What's next?

- [GitHub Actions documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/actions)
- [Automate repository tasks with GitHub agentic workflows](https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/automate-repository-tasks-with-github-agentic-workflows/)
- [GitHub Skills](https://skills.github.com)
